label: Early repeat speed
headline: Purchase-two timing is one of the clearest early signals of long-term value.
body: The model allocates about 42% of total importance to repeat-speed features alone.

label: Category depth
headline: Category expansion is one of the strongest route-to-value mechanisms in the base.
body: Each additional category is associated with roughly 23% higher event intensity in the survival model.

label: Omnichannel
headline: Using more than one channel is a value accelerator, not just a descriptive trait.
body: Omnichannel behavior is associated with about 12% higher event intensity in the survival model.

label: Promo leakage
headline: Heavy discount reliance damages the quality of value, even when customers keep buying.
body: Among promising repeaters, lower-promo customers generate about EUR 167 more margin per customer.
